name: Switch

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField) the bubble checkbox's required, plus appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the switch (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the switch (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered before the switch (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label), linked via for/id so clicking it toggles the switch.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: HTML name for the hidden bubble checkbox that mirrors the switch state, so it posts in a native <form> (a plain <button> posts nothing). Falls back to a composing FormField's Name when unset.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Value submitted for this switch in a native <form> POST when Name is set and the switch is on. Mirrors the native checkbox default of "on".

parameters.name: Checked
parameters.description: Whether the switch is on. Controlled together with CheckedChanged; when left unbound the switch tracks its own toggles internally.

parameters.name: CheckedChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the user toggles the switch, with the new checked state.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the switch cannot be toggled and renders with reduced opacity.

parameters.name: Loading
parameters.description: When true, shows a small spinner in the thumb, disables toggling, and sets aria-busy — for an in-flight async state change.

parameters.name: OnLabel
parameters.description: Text shown next to the switch (and used as a fallback accessible name) while it is on.

parameters.name: OffLabel
parameters.description: Text shown next to the switch (and used as a fallback accessible name) while it is off.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the switch button, exposed via aria-label. Recommended for icon-only switches that have no visible text. If omitted but OnLabel/OffLabel are set, the current one is used automatically so screen readers announce the switch's purpose.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Switch size. Supports Sm, Md (default), Lg.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the thumb animates with a bouncy spring cubic-bezier timing instead of the default linear transition. Default is false.

parameters.name: HapticFeedback
parameters.description: When true, triggers a short haptic vibration via navigator.vibrate() each time the switch is toggled. Silently no-ops on browsers without the Vibration API (e.g. iOS Safari). Default is false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the switch's track button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the switch's track button (a splatted id is stripped inside a FormField so the generated id keeps the label wired up).

events.name: CheckedChanged
events.description: Fires when the user toggles the switch, with the new checked state.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Switch @bind-Checked="_checked" />
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Dark Mode is @(_checked ? "on" : "off")</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private bool _checked = true;
}

examples.title: Settings Example
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Justify="between">
    <Stack Gap="0">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="medium" Leading="none">Email Notifications</Lumeo.Text>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Receive emails about account activity.</Lumeo.Text>
    </Stack>
    <Switch @bind-Checked="_emailNotif" />
</Flex>

mdSummary:
# Switch

Toggle switch for boolean settings.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/switch

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Switch | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Switch | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField) the bubble checkbox's required, plus appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label. |
| Switch | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state. |
| Switch | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the switch (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText. |
| Switch | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the switch (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display. |
| Switch | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text rendered before the switch (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label), linked via for/id so clicking it toggles the switch. |
| Switch | Name | `string?` | `` | HTML name for the hidden bubble checkbox that mirrors the switch state, so it posts in a native \<form\> (a plain \<button\> posts nothing). Falls back to a composing FormField's Name when unset. |
| Switch | Value | `string?` | `` | Value submitted for this switch in a native \<form\> POST when Name is set and the switch is on. Mirrors the native checkbox default of "on". |
| Switch | Checked | `bool` | `false` | Whether the switch is on. Controlled together with CheckedChanged; when left unbound the switch tracks its own toggles internally. |
| Switch | CheckedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Fires when the user toggles the switch, with the new checked state. |
| Switch | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, the switch cannot be toggled and renders with reduced opacity. |
| Switch | Loading | `bool` | `false` | When true, shows a small spinner in the thumb, disables toggling, and sets aria-busy — for an in-flight async state change. |
| Switch | OnLabel | `string?` | `` | Text shown next to the switch (and used as a fallback accessible name) while it is on. |
| Switch | OffLabel | `string?` | `` | Text shown next to the switch (and used as a fallback accessible name) while it is off. |
| Switch | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the switch button, exposed via aria-label. Recommended for icon-only switches that have no visible text. If omitted but OnLabel/OffLabel are set, the current one is used automatically so screen readers announce the switch's purpose. |
| Switch | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Switch size. Supports Sm, Md (default), Lg. |
| Switch | Animated | `bool` | `false` | When true, the thumb animates with a bouncy spring cubic-bezier timing instead of the default linear transition. Default is false. |
| Switch | HapticFeedback | `bool` | `false` | When true, triggers a short haptic vibration via navigator.vibrate() each time the switch is toggled. Silently no-ops on browsers without the Vibration API (e.g. iOS Safari). Default is false. |
| Switch | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the switch's track button. |
| Switch | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the switch's track button (a splatted id is stripped inside a FormField so the generated id keeps the label wired up). |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `CheckedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Fires when the user toggles the switch, with the new checked state.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Switch />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Switch/Switch.razor`
